subcodes.first_line: O thou Trusted One! Upon thee be the Glory of God and His praise! Thy services at the Divine Threshold, in the days of His Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت امین علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه خدمات آنجناب در آستان الهی چه در ایام ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
